description: All your gambling dreams can now come true in survival Minecraft!
body:
# 777
### Adds gambling to survival Minecraft!

Throw away all your precious resources for a chance to win **BIG** at the Slot Machine!
Or if you are feeling a little bit classier, try your hand at the Blackjack Table for an opportunity to duplicate your favorite items!

Intended for use in survival, there are several amazing rewards you can get such as:

- Unbreakable tools & armor
- Infinite duration potions
- Stackable totem of undying
- And more!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TZEfH9YNfEo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Slot Machine Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f397a87b1680c3ae721558da516652efe43542c9.png)
![Blackjack Table Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ad7faaaa4f2e7e6dd1c272f7bcfb58fc1caa5ca.png)

## Types of bets and their odds (Slot Machine)
### Low Bet (1 in 160)
- Iron block
- Gold Block
- Emerald Block
- Diamond

### High Bet (1 in 80)
- Diamond block
- Netherite ingot
- Rabbits foot

### Max Bet (1 in 40)
- Netherite block
- Player head

Note: If adding to a pre-existing world, type `/reload` before trying to use it!
